notes: OVERPASS.BBS — Mobile, AL. STEEPLE is sysop. Gulf-coast nautical register; STEEPLE uses keel-keeper for the W11 glossary. Slower posts, deeper threads. Three boards: the harbor (general), the tide (technical), the oyster bar (regulars + food).

boards.name: the_harbor
boards.subtitle: the public dock
boards.flavor: Where the sysop posts the tide table and the weather. The slow ones land here.

boards.name: the_tide
boards.subtitle: salt + copper + bell-buoy maintenance
boards.flavor: Bell-buoy tuning, marine wiring, the technical board's coast equivalent.

boards.name: the_oyster_bar
boards.subtitle: regulars + the menu
boards.flavor: Where the people who live here go after the harbor closes.
